creation_time_rule: GitHub commit timestamp is the authoritative creation time for this direct-write receipt.
trigger: Cloud Shell repeatedly booted during local replay attempts.
reason: Local shell instability must not block public receipt preservation.
source_evidence: user screenshots showing successful pushed commits
user report that Cloud Shell booted repeatedly

screenshot_observed_commits.observed_meaning: American Dew MN retail replay push observed in screenshot
MN Schooling 2026 replay commit observed in screenshot

new_operating_rule: Do not trust crashed local shell state.
Do not keep sending giant bash blocks when the shell is unstable.
Use GitHub Direct for small receipt fixes when Cloud Shell repeatedly boots.
Promote only what GitHub actually preserves.
Screenshots are observer evidence, not final verification by themselves.
Pushed GitHub commits are the preservation layer.
copy_paste_doctrine: One copy block must equal one paste target.
child_level_rule: A child should know what happens after paste.
